case_title: ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC VS. AHMED M MEFTAH et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PER 1033CCP(B) ; INTEREST CALCULATION; ATTY. FEE CALCULATION AND WAIVER OF EXCESS PRINCIPAL. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEFTAH, AHMED M $5,783.06 PRINCIPAL, $1,409.36 INTEREST, $347.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,539.92, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP &395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL,FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ASSET ACCEPTANCE LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT MEFTAH, AHMED M
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF JAN-06-2010, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MEFTAH, AHMED M
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JAN-06-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $347.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MEFTAH, AHMED M
